reviews.content: 클리어런스 세일 제품에 속해있어 부담을 덜고 구매했습니다. 디자인이 훌륭하고 일단 가벼워서 가벼운 산택과 트래킹에 두루 편안하게 신고 다녀요.

Mega wygodne, miękkie w środku, doskonałe na teren. Bardzo dobrze się sprawdzają podczas upałów, są przewiewne i do tego wytrzymałe.

la scarpa pur estremamente semplice si è rivelata ottima e l'ho utilizzata fino a consumarla, adesso mi oriento verso prodotti più sofisticati ma per iniziare è perfetta

2 години ги носих като основни обувки без почти никакви следи от употреба по конституцията. Все още ги нося, но по-рядко и вече на едната има едно конче което си е излязло от мястото. първите ми обувки които издържат над половин година!!!

El título lo dice todo. Me vi obliga jubilar estás maravillosas zapatillas después de que me hicieran un poco de daño en el talón de Aquiles y porque ya la suela estaba desgastada e iban a empezar a despegarse.
Lo más débil de la zapatilla es la tela al final del empeine que del uso prolongado se hace algún agujero, pero eso son pequeñas medallas para unos zapatos que me han durado 5 años.
Muito confortáveis,  dão uma estabilidade espetacular e duram imenso tempo.
Dobra przyczepność,  sprawdzają się w różnych warunkach

pour faire du trail super chaussure, accroche tout types de terrain, légère, très confortable  et résistante, même, après plus de deux ans, le tissus ne c'est pas déchiré, juste un défaut  au niveau du talon à l'intérieur de la chaussure le tissus c'est usé très vite , laissant sortir une plaque en plastique, qui à la longue me coupé la peau du tendon au dessus du talon, sinon j'en rachèterai bien une paire
Polecam.

Best shoes I've ever had. I won't say this for any shoe I've had this is the only one. I've gone through a looot of shoes but this one you can wear for days and not get your feet tired and the grip is great even for treks and runs. I'd buy this again and again.

the shoes is not good. it is trail running shoes and hence is supposed to be a bit sturdy. it was costly as well since it cost me rs. 5500 perhaps. However, within few days of buying the coating over mesh gave away. then the lace broke up. Look wise also it's not good. It does not have enough sponge/padding to give your feet comfort while running. Overall a big let down. Very disappointed with the product. Won't suggest anyone buying it. After this incidence I haven't purchased any shoe form Decathlon.
Très confortable, très bonne accroche.

I uave worn this Trail Shoes on and off for about a year. 
Looks narrow. When worned, feel ok but not wide feeling like 'D' width. Cushioning wise, slight better than normal EVA but not as cushy as I like. 
Sole is good as its thicker than normal road running shoes. Can defintely last a long time. My shoes soles has not eaten into the EVA yet after 1 year. I am a heel striker.

Non sono un assiduo corridore ma queste le ho prese due anni e 350km fa con l’intento di fare del trail running e mi ci sono trovato bene! Una settima fa ho acquistato una paio di scarpe di categoria e marca superiore e onestamente sento la differenza…. Ma queste per quanto costano fanno più che bene il loro lavoro! CONSIGLIATISSIME

The lifespan of the shoes was barely a year. I used them for walking, but the sole was of very poor quality, wore out within a few months. When I took them to Decathlon for a warranty claim, the helpdesk advised me to use them for only 5-7 km a week. The quality and customer service were very disappointing. Avoid if possible.
便宜好穿

Almeno il terzo paio che acquisto,... Queste le sto utilizzando come scarpe per tutti i giorni, altri paia utilizzati per camminate... Ottimo rapporto qualità prezzo.... Buona durata e prestazioni durevoli nel tempo... Per una s arpa pari caratteri he adesso ci vuole il doppio del prezzo di queste

Good quality shoes It's my second pair of shoes of the same brand and model.
Chaussures trail homme avec un bon maintien. Plutôt destinées à des parcours pas trop techniques, faire attention sur sol humide (en ville). Très bon rapport qualité.
Good

Très bonnes chaussures pour ce prix. elles sont très aérées et ne conviennent donc pas du tout pour un terrain mouillé (vous aurez vite les pieds trempés). J'ai du mal à m'en séparer : c'est devenu mes "pantoufles d'extérieur". Pour plus de commodité j'ai modifié le laçage et j'ai mis des élastiques. Bon on va pas se mentir il y a mieux en terme d'accroche, de confort, etc... mais plus cher. Leur seul vrai défaut c'est un look un peu vieillot
Relación calidad precio muy buena

polyvalentes par temps sec ou boueux

Muy bien!
para entrenamientos cortos y por terrenos mixtos. Los pies están poco protegidos a impactos y inclemencias

Dopo mesi di utilizzo posso dire che sono buone scarpe per correre, su sterrato e poco asfalto.
Ammortizzano non tanto ma per me non è un difetto. Molto leggere

Je m'en sers depuis plus d'un an au travail et lors de petites randos, elles ont du vécu et sont toujours portables ! Je recommande.
